blended.narrative: Mt. Seymour is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 587 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
